body:
Daily health 2026-05-04
- Cadence: ok (content/projects/research supervisors all posted)
- Alerts (24h): 0
- Stalls: 0 over 24h threshold; 3 open content tasks to content-domain-lead (backlog refill + 2 research-driven prompts) all <1h old, on track
- Note: Tier-3 backbone healthy. Calendar gap resolved same-day. Two watch items: notebook_id TBD in research PRD, 2 NLM prompts pending live query.
Dispatching notion-db-manager for task: Full sync all 6 databases

Daily health 2026-05-23
- Cadence: weekend run — no supervisor posts expected today (Sat). Last seen: daily-content-supervisor 2026-05-08, daily-project-supervisor 2026-05-05, daily-research-supervisor not sighted this week (check research channel).
- Alerts (24h): 0 — all clear across content/projects/research/meta.
- Stalls: 0 — 2 aged task messages in projects (2026-05-04 BLOCKER, 2026-05-05 SPRINT START) both resolved same-day per supervisor done digests.
- Note: Weekend health pass. No red signals. Research supervisor cadence is the watch item — last confirmed post predates 2026-05-08; verify it ran this week.

Daily health 2026-05-23 complete. Weekend run — all signals green. No alerts, no stalls, no active supervisors (expected Sat). Watch item: daily-research-supervisor cadence not confirmed this week — first weekday run next week should verify.
